scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p dist/src/assets && cp -r src/assets/* dist/src/assets/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:css: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('src/index.css')) { require('child_process').execSync('npx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/index.css -o dist/assets/index.css --minify', {stdio: 'inherit'}); } else { console.log('Skipping CSS compilation since src/index.css is missing.'); }"
scripts.build:js: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('src/main.tsx')) { require('esbuild').buildSync({ entryPoints: ['src/main.tsx'], bundle: true, minify: true, sourcemap: true, outfile: 'dist/assets/index.js', format: 'esm', loader: { '.png': 'file', '.svg': 'file', '.jpg': 'file', '.webp': 'file', '.mp3': 'file', '.woff': 'file', '.woff2': 'file', '.ttf': 'file' }, external: ['*.css'], define: { 'process.env.NODE_ENV': '\"production\"', 'process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY': '\"\"' } }); } else { console.log('Skipping client JS bundling since src/main.tsx is missing.'); }"
scripts.build:html: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('index.html')) { let h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); const idx=h.indexOf('</head>'); if(idx!==-1) h=h.slice(0,idx)+'\n    <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"/assets/index.css\" />\n'+h.slice(idx); h=h.replace('/src/main.tsx','/assets/index.js'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html',h); } else { console.log('Skipping HTML generation since index.html is missing.'); }"
scripts.build:server: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('server.ts')) { require('esbuild').buildSync({ entryPoints: ['server.ts'], bundle: true, platform: 'node', format: 'cjs', packages: 'external', sourcemap: true, outfile: 'dist/server.cjs' }); } else { console.log('Skipping server compilation since server.ts is missing.'); }"
scripts.build: npm run build:clean && npm run build:copy && npm run build:assets && npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:html && npm run build:server
